hero.title: Hi, Edson Xavier here.
hero.description: Computer Science student dedicated to software engineering, with expertise in Java, Android Studio, and database management.

trashcan.title: Self Recyclable Trash Can
trashcan.description: An Arduino-based prototype that automates the identification and sorting of recyclables through color sensors.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: I am a Computer Science student at UniFAJ, currently focused on building a strong foundational base to kickstart my professional career. I have been concentrating my studies on the Java ecosystem, developing academic projects that involve backend logic and relational databases, always aiming to apply standards like UML modeling.
about.p2: In mobile development, I am exploring the capabilities of Native Android. Through Android Studio, I strive to understand application lifecycles and the importance of creating functional interfaces combined with organized code.
about.p3: Beyond my coursework, I dedicate time to learning about infrastructure and productivity by configuring environments with Docker and WSL. My goal is to find an opportunity where I can apply this initial technical knowledge and grow alongside a software engineering team.
